disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profuse watery diarrhoea, more than 10 times in a day, worsening over 48 hours, with constant diffuse abdominal cramping and no visible blood
trigger_question_examples: How many times has he opened his bowels today?
What do the bowel motions look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been more than ten times today, all watery, and his stomach is cramping the whole time. It's much worse than yesterday. No blood that we've seen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently receiving cancer immunotherapy (a checkpoint-inhibitor infusion) for melanoma, last dose about 10 days ago
trigger_question_examples: Is he on any treatments or medications at the moment?
Has he had any recent medical treatment or infusions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's on a cancer immunotherapy drip for his melanoma — the last one was about ten days ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Near-fainting and marked lightheadedness on standing, with profound weakness leaving him bedbound
trigger_question_examples: Does he feel dizzy or faint when he stands up?
How is his energy and strength?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time he stands he goes grey and nearly passes out, so he's just staying in bed. He's got no strength at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to keep down oral fluids because of nausea
trigger_question_examples: Is he able to drink and keep fluids down?
Is he feeling sick or vomiting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He can't keep anything down — he feels too sick, and drinking just makes the cramps and nausea worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: An itchy red blotchy rash appeared on the trunk about a day before the diarrhoea started
trigger_question_examples: Has he had any rash or skin changes?
Did anything else come on before the diarrhoea?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah — a few days ago he came up in an itchy red blotchy rash on his chest and tummy, then the diarrhoea started after that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No unusual foods, no recent travel, and no recent antibiotic use
trigger_question_examples: Has he eaten anything unusual or been travelling?
Has he taken any antibiotics recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing unusual to eat, no travelling, and he hasn't had any antibiotics.
